projects.title: This Website
projects.desc: The website you're visiting right now

projects.title: TurtleWave Search
projects.desc: A simple search-engine. My first web project ever.

projects.title: TurtleNet
projects.desc: 2000s-themed social-media where you can ONLY post turtles.

projects.title: GoSwift
projects.desc: A simple but fast URL shortener.

projects.title: TurtleWave Edit
projects.desc: A very simple and completely local image editor & compressor

projects.title: TurtleWave Games
projects.desc: Simple webgames you can play in your browser

projects.title: TurtleWave Takes
projects.desc: Share quotes & non-political takes with other users anonymously

projects.title: TurtleWave Chat
projects.desc: A very simple and privacy-focused chat service

projects.title: Faith Grid
projects.desc: A Christian-based website with online features, an online Bible, and more. A few of my friends wanted me to make this.

projects.title: Feedback-inator
projects.desc: Uses AI to give feedback on how your webpage looks and functions

projects.title: NoRobotsAllowed
projects.desc: A fun little game where you have to get past many obstacles to prove you're a human, starting easy (with a CAPTCHA) then getting continously harder. This project no longer exists due to Glitch shutting down.

projects.title: Squire Town
projects.desc: A 2D website where you could create and play tiny games with a default character. This included collisions, forums, and more but no longer exists due to Glitch shutting down.

projects.title: And so much more
projects.desc: There's too many to include, most of them being discontinued because of the Glitch shutdown or I just don't care about them anymore

projects.title: Shell Surfer
projects.desc: A fast web-browser built on Electron with Chromium web viewing (but not a Chromium base). It comes with no data collection or mandatory accounts.

projects.title: NoMoreScroll
projects.desc: A customizable extension that lets you block common doomscrolling/endless media sites and custom URLs.

projects.title: Faith Grid: Extended
projects.desc: An addon to Faith Grid that allows you to use some of the features on other sites and other Faith Grid-related features.

projects.title: Search with TurtleWave
projects.desc: Sets your default search engine to TurtleWave Search

projects.title: Minecraft Mods (Modrinth)
projects.desc: I've created several Minecraft mods on both Modrinth and Curseforge using various tools, including Java

projects.title: Minecraft Mods (Curseforge)
projects.desc: I've created several Minecraft mods on both Modrinth and Curseforge using various tools, including Java

projects.title: TABS mods
projects.desc: I've created a Totally Accurate Battle Simulator mod using C#

projects.title: Superpower City
projects.desc: A semi-popular Superpower game. The player count here isn't really stable, like, at all; some weeks it averages 50+ and some weeks it averages 10. This is only game I'm including here because all my other games suck.
